steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The preceding sentence claims the event “used to be much smaller and more limited geographically.” The blank sentence then introduces the 1950 World Cup with only 13 teams—a specific historical case that illustrates this claim.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”For example,” introduces a concrete instance that illustrates the preceding claim. The other three either suggest additional information, signal contradiction, or express temporal meaning. That matches choice D — D is correct.
